# Harendra Singh Negi – Senior Full Stack Developer

> Senior Full Stack Developer & Team Lead with 6+ years of experience based in Dehradun, Uttarakhand, India.

## Identity

- **Full Name:** Harendra Singh Negi
- **Role:** Senior Full Stack Developer & Team Lead
- **Location:** Dehradun, Uttarakhand, India
- **Email:** harendrasinghnegi83@gmail.com
- **Phone:** +91 95577 35224
- **Website:** https://harendra-singh-negi.github.io/
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/hsnegi
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/harendra-singh-negi

## Professional Summary

Harendra Singh Negi is a Senior Full Stack Developer and Team Lead with over 6 years of professional experience. He specialises in building scalable CRM systems, real-time web applications, and e-commerce platforms. He is currently leading development at Safe Lanes Innovation Pte Ltd in Dehradun, where he manages cross-functional teams and delivers production-grade maritime software systems.

He has delivered 10+ enterprise CRM systems and 50+ client projects. His expertise spans React.js, Node.js, Next.js, NestJS, Angular, MySQL, MongoDB, Socket.io, and GitLab CI/CD.

## Current Role

**Safe Lanes Innovation Pte Ltd** – Senior Full Stack Developer & Team Lead (May 2023 – Present)
- Led real-time data sync systems using Socket.io, ReactJS, and MySQL
- Architected and maintained CI/CD pipelines via GitLab
- Migrated Angular v9 to v19 with standalone components; upgraded NestJS v9 to v11
- Architected offline-capable application with background synchronisation via Socket.io
- Mentored junior developers; received Top Performer award in 2024 and 2025
- Collaborated with AI tools (V0, Bolt, Claude) to accelerate frontend development

## Past Experience

- **Grassroots Private Limited** – Software Developer (Apr 2022 – Apr 2023, Bangalore): Delivered 10+ CRM systems for Swiggy, Max Healthcare, Manipal Ambulance. Won Top Performer, Extra Mile, and Excellent Contributor awards.
- **PinCox Software Pvt Ltd** – Senior Developer (Oct 2021 – Feb 2022): Led development of HTDukan e-commerce app.
- **Sparous** – Software Developer (Oct 2019 – Feb 2020): Built versatile e-commerce platform.
- **Freelancer** (Jul 2018 – Oct 2021): Completed 50+ dynamic web projects and 20+ MLM projects.
- **Smartcore Tech Soft** – Software Developer (Mar 2019 – Sept 2019): Trainer and developer.
- **Call Connect India** – Software Developer (Apr 2018 – Aug 2018): Built custom web and WordPress solutions.

## Technical Skills

- **Frontend:** React.js, Next.js, AngularJS (v9–v19), HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Material UI, Redux
- **Backend:** Node.js, Express.js, NestJS (v9–v11), PHP, Laravel
- **Databases:** MySQL, MongoDB, Firebase, Amazon RDS, SQLite
- **Mobile:** React Native Expo
- **DevOps & Tools:** GitLab CI/CD, GitHub, Docker, AWS, NGINX, Jenkins, Postman, Swagger
- **Real-Time:** Socket.io
- **AI Tools Used:** ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Claude, Bolt, V0

## Key Projects

- **Sail App** (sailerp.sl-sail.com): Maritime consultancy platform – vessel inspections, risk analysis, SIRE/SIRE 2.0, PDF/Excel reports. Stack: Next.js, Node.js, Socket.io, MySQL, AWS RDS, GitLab CI/CD.
- **Vessel Sync System**: Real-time ship-to-cloud data synchronisation with offline support, retry logic, Socket.io.
- **CRM Suite (Grassroots)**: 10+ custom CRMs for Swiggy, Manipal Ambulance, Max Healthcare.
- **HTDukan**: Android web app + e-commerce platform with mobile-first UI.
